## Proposed Changes

- [ ] Code implementation aligns exactly with approved specification
- [ ] Formatting and linting checks run and passed (`ruff` and `black`)

## Pipeline Verification
- [ ] **Generate:** Was this change designed before implementation?
- [ ] **Review:** Has it been peer-reviewed or reviewed by the Code Owner?
- [ ] **Refine:** Have review points been addressed?
- [ ] **Approve & Commit:** Ready for merge?
